entries.summary: A schema-backed IR document does not match the expected payload shape.
entries.pathShape: bundle-relative JSON document path or JSON pointer
entries.suggestedFix: Validate the document against the package schema and correct the rejected field.

entries.summary: The bundle manifest is missing required metadata or contains invalid file entries.
entries.pathShape: manifest.json or manifest entry JSON pointer
entries.suggestedFix: Emit a manifest with schema, version, requiredCapabilities, entry, and files that point inside the bundle.

entries.summary: Raw Three.js source is not a durable ThreeNative authoring source.
entries.pathShape: source document path or authoring declaration path
entries.suggestedFix: Author through the ThreeNative SDK or structured source documents, then compile to IR.

entries.summary: Raw Bevy or native runtime authoring is outside the portable public contract.
entries.pathShape: source document path or unsupported declaration path
entries.suggestedFix: Represent game data in TypeScript SDK declarations or structured source documents instead of native runtime code.

families.summary: Unsupported 2D workflow diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use promoted ThreeNative 3D authoring surfaces or an explicit supported UI workflow.

families.summary: Invalid active camera or active-scene reference diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Point active references at unique declared scene or camera IDs.

families.summary: Animation document version or field diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported animation document fields and version 0.1.0.

families.summary: Animation clip, graph, transition, mask, parameter, or event diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare valid clips, states, parameters, transitions, and referenced model assets.

families.summary: Asset catalog, source, embedded, network, group, or reload diagnostics.
families.pathShape: asset ID or assets JSON pointer
families.suggestedFix: Use bundle-local supported asset formats and valid catalog references.

families.summary: Atmosphere lighting, fog, shadow, or color diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use finite numeric atmosphere settings and supported colors/distances.

families.summary: Audio asset, bus, emitter, listener, control, transition, or unsupported platform diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Reference declared audio assets and keep playback settings inside portable audio support.

families.summary: Backend-only service diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Keep runtime behavior portable or wait for an explicit backend service contract.

families.summary: Bundle, asset, texture, or model budget diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Reduce asset size/detail or raise an explicit supported budget when allowed.

families.summary: Camera viewport, target, layer, render target, helper, or projection diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Reference declared targets and use portable camera and render-target settings.

families.summary: Character controller dependency, speed, slope, input, push, or grounding diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare required body, collider, transform, and input references with supported controller settings.

families.summary: Component schema diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare component schemas before component values reference them.

families.summary: Cloud or account-bound storage diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use portable local-data declarations until a cloud storage provider contract exists.

families.summary: Duplicate entity, material, asset, or other ID diagnostics.
families.pathShape: ID path or collection JSON pointer
families.suggestedFix: Make IDs unique within the owning document and referenced bundle scope.

families.summary: Editor project, document access, source patch, inspector, or hot-reload diagnostics.
families.pathShape: editor project document path or JSON pointer
families.suggestedFix: Patch source-persistable documents only and keep generated/runtime documents inspect-only.

families.summary: Entity reference diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Reference declared entity IDs in the owning scene/world scope.

families.summary: Environment scene, terrain, scatter, LOD, path, bookmark, or asset diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare valid environment assets, bounds, scatter settings, and terrain/path data.

families.summary: Event schema diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare event schemas before systems or scripts read/write those events.

families.summary: Invalid bundle file diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Keep bundle files valid JSON where required and inside the emitted bundle.

families.summary: First-person controls diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use finite supported speed, acceleration, sensitivity, height, and input references.

families.summary: glTF scene, handle, node, attribute, operation, or extras diagnostics.
families.pathShape: gltf scene JSON pointer or handle path
families.suggestedFix: Reference declared model assets and stable node/material handles with supported metadata.

families.summary: Heightmap asset format, encoding, dimension, or range diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use structured JSON heightmap assets with finite dimensions, supported encoding, and ordered height ranges.

families.summary: Inverse kinematics unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Avoid IK authoring until it is promoted in the capability manifest.

families.summary: Input action, axis, binding, gamepad, controls, or override diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare stable actions/axes and reference supported keyboard/gamepad bindings.

families.summary: Declarative kinematic mover mode, direction, waypoint, and parameter diagnostics.
families.pathShape: world entity KinematicMover component JSON pointer
families.suggestedFix: Use mode sine or waypoints with finite speed, direction, radius, phase, and waypoint values.

families.summary: Light budget, shadow, filter, or debug-gizmo diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported light counts, shadow settings, and debug metadata.

families.summary: Local data, save slot, settings, schema, migration, autosave, or runtime-handle diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use serializable schemas, unique keys, and supported local save/settings declarations.

families.summary: Bundle manifest entry, path, file, or version diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Emit manifest entries with bundle-relative paths and supported manifest version.

families.summary: Material alpha, blend, texture, factor, extension, depth, emissive, or unsupported feature diagnostics.
families.pathShape: material ID or materials JSON pointer
families.suggestedFix: Use declared texture assets and portable material fields.

families.summary: Mesh primitive, attribute, index, bounds, topology, usage, generation, or payload diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported generated/custom mesh payloads with valid positions, indices, bounds, and budgets.

families.summary: Morph target, clip, weight, keyframe, or unsupported animation diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use declared morph targets and supported clip/keyframe values.

families.summary: Native runtime authoring diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Author through TypeScript SDK or structured source documents instead of native runtime APIs.

families.summary: Navigation region, query, crowd, off-mesh link, dynamic rebake, or backend diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported navigation declarations and avoid unpromoted backend-specific options.

families.summary: Networking unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Keep networking out of portable IR until a supported service contract exists.

families.summary: Overlay entry, message, target profile, input, transparency, or z-index diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare supported overlay messages and target profiles with valid z-order and fields.

families.summary: Particle emitter, shape, rate, lifetime, max, radius, or unsupported field diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported emitter fields and avoid unpromoted particle features.

families.summary: Performance target, threshold, or budget warning diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported target profiles and keep measured values under declared thresholds.

families.summary: Rigid body, collider, joint, trigger, sensor, solver, filter, CCD, or unsupported physics diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported collider/body shapes and avoid unpromoted solver or engine-handle fields.

families.summary: Platform API unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use ThreeNative portable service facades instead of browser, OS, or native platform APIs.

families.summary: Prefab document list or version diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported prefab document version and top-level shape.

families.summary: Prefab ID, entity, root, hierarchy, parent, or component diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare unique prefab/entity IDs and acyclic prefab hierarchy roots.

families.summary: Property animation unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use promoted transform or morph animation features until property animation is supported.

families.summary: Raw runtime source unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Author with ThreeNative SDK declarations or structured source documents.

families.summary: Renderer skybox, environment map, light probe, post effect, shader/plugin, visibility, or advanced feature diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use portable renderer fields and check the capability manifest for partial features.

families.summary: Render target, layer, shadow, or visibility diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported render layer, target, shadow, and visibility values.

families.summary: Required capability declaration diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare only supported capabilities or gate unsupported features explicitly.

families.summary: Resource schema diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare resource schemas before resources or systems reference them.

families.summary: Animation retargeting unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Bake retargeted animation data before import or wait for promoted retargeting support.

families.summary: Runtime config, renderer, time, fixed delta, paused, or window diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported runtime config version and finite renderer/time/window settings.

families.summary: Scene collection diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare at least one valid scene and a supported scenes document version.

families.summary: Scene ID, initial scene, entity, asset group, UI, audio, input, system, transition, or ownership diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Reference declared scene-owned assets, entities, systems, UI, audio, and transitions.

families.summary: Generic schema field, type, unknown field, required field, payload, or version diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use the exported JSON Schema and supported document version to correct the payload.

families.summary: Portable script audio, external source, field, ID, sound, or unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Keep scripts inside portable host APIs and reference declared audio resources.

families.summary: Shader custom, bindless, storage buffer, defs, or render phase unsupported diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use built-in portable materials until shader features are promoted.

families.summary: Declarative spawner diagnostics.
families.pathShape: world entity Spawner component JSON pointer
families.suggestedFix: Use supported spawner modes, prefab references, spawn areas, counts, intervals, and despawn policy fields.

families.summary: Support profile or capability diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare valid support profiles and capabilities known to the manifest.

families.summary: Systems document version or field diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported systems document version and fields.

families.summary: System query, write, resource, event, state, lifecycle, plugin, task, observer, prefab command, order, or service diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare schemas and permissions before systems read/write resources, events, components, or services.

families.summary: Target profile schema, version, or target enum diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use the canonical target-profile schema literal, supported version, and web/desktop target names.

families.summary: Target profile collection diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare at least one supported target profile.

families.summary: Texture fallback, variant, target, or delivery format diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Declare bundle-local baseline texture fallbacks and only target supported optional delivery formats.

families.summary: Transform value or transform animation diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use finite vec3 transform values and supported transform animation tracks.

families.summary: UI node, layout, style, accessibility, font, image, focus, navigation, widget, safe area, rich text, or unsupported field diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported retained UI nodes, styles, accessible names, and asset references.

families.summary: Vector value diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use three finite numeric values.

families.summary: Walkability blocker, radius, height, eye height, or region diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use finite walkability dimensions and valid non-self-intersecting regions.

families.summary: World entry or version diagnostics.
families.suggestedFix: Use supported world document version and valid world entries.

internalClassifications.summary: Verifier-only diagnostics are owned by tools/verify and are not IR package diagnostics.
